Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for money she says she spent on vacations and car repairs and accuses him of stealing from her co-workers at a company function; a woman says she moved out of an apartment because she feared for her life.
Video.title: Love, Lies and Larceny

Video.summary: An 11-year age difference and an aborted pregnancy put Illinois couple Shakia and Leontae in a power struggle.
Video.title: Yancy vs. Spaulding

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: First, a woman sues her brother for failure to repay a loan! Then, the plaintiff sues for rental repayment.
Video.title: Pay Up or Get Out

Video.summary: First, man sues his ex-wife for gas bill. Then, plaintiffs are suing for unpaid wages and fuel costs.
Video.title: All Gas, No Breaks

Video.summary: The plaintiffs say a used car salesman sold them a damaged car, then repossessed it; a vacation rental among friends turns sour.
Video.title: Lemons for Sale

Video.summary: Ex-roommates call each other a deadbeat and a con artist; a former tenant wants to be compensated for repairs he made to a flooded, moldy basement, and his security deposit.
Video.title: Con-venient Deadbeat

Video.summary: A mother and son sue over damages to the son's car, while the defendant blames faulty tires; a man sues his ex-girlfriend for unpaid rent and a lease buyout fee.
Video.title: Wheel Deal or No Deal?

Video.summary: A man claims a car repair shop damaged his car; a woman claims her cat was attacked by her neighbor's dog.
Video.title: Claws vs Paws

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property damage and theft of a cell phone, and he says she stole his assistance check; a car accident reportedly caused by the defendant has left the plaintiff with damage to her car and lost wages.
Video.title: Checked Out

Video.summary: A plaintiff sues her step-granddaughter and boyfriend for $3,500 for an auto loan that has gone unpaid; faulty T-shirt shirt printer.
Video.title: Granddaughter Theft Auto

Video.summary: Debbie is in for a shocking surprise when she catches her boyfriend, Terrance, sneaking around with her twin sister.
Video.title: Young vs. Goodwin

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: A surprise witness and a bombshell reveal blow the lid off Joshua's property-damage claim against girlfriend Tonya.
Video.title: Brown vs. Bell

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: Devout religion and a party lifestyle collide in Texas couple Lamonte and Leola's relationship.
Video.title: Hawley vs. Gibson

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Ex-lovers Kaniyah and Bleu feud in court over a stolen pair of limited-edition luxury shoes.
Video.title: Whipple vs. Crawley

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: Breon issues his girlfriend, Chenika, an ultimatum regarding her refusal to have another baby and grow their family of nine to 10.
Video.title: Holland vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: An unruly puppy and Darius' girlfriend's panty problem has Darius issuing his girlfriend, Ife, an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wilson vs. Graham

Video.summary: A woman is prepared to walk away from her boyfriend, the father of her unborn child, because of his party lifestyle.
Video.title: Smith vs. Lamisere

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: California model Nicole sues her ex-boyfriend Peter for property exchange of their pet dog that he kept after the breakup.
Video.title: Serrano vs. Plemons

Video.summary: Dave Shelton sues Gary Garver for $10,000, claiming unpaid wages for two years on Garver's radio show. Shelton says he quit due to on-air mistreatment, but Garver insists Shelton was just a guest and never requested payment.
Video.title: Radio Riot

Video.summary: Erica Hinton sues Bethania Rincon for $900, claiming bleach spilled on her expensive MCM bag at a salon. Bethania argues the damage was from oil stains and cleaning spray after Erica placed food on the bag.
Video.title: You Bleached My Designer Bag

Video.summary: Desta Krupa sues neighbor Marie for $571.67, claiming she’s stuck paying for an Xbox and iPod bought on her line of credit. Marie counters, blaming payment issues on the credit company and says the iPod was a gift.
Video.title: Feuding Friends

Video.summary: Nancy Moses Hill sues Tracy Jordan for $5,000, claiming Tracy kept too much money from selling her family's antiques. Tracy argues she followed the contract and paid what was due. Nancy insists her elderly mother’s cherished items were undervalued.
Video.title: Antique Ambush

Video.summary: Bruce Pouncy claims his landlord, Beatrice Smith, forced him out and kept his $1,200 deposit after he suggested a new roommate. Beatrice says Bruce left the apartment a mess, removed the oven door, and didn’t pay rent.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: Anthony claims he saw explicit text messages between the defendant and her ex, so he sues for unpaid loans.
Video.title: Raunchy Texts and Explicit Agreements

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff says friend skipped out on their lease. Then, man alleges ex stole his jewelry.
Video.title: Skipping Out

Video.summary: First, business owner claims the defendant failed to pay him. Then, plaintiff is suing for a plane ticket.
Video.title: Cleaning House

Video.summary: First, a client demands refund from fitness trainer. Then, a woman seeks payment for bounced check.
Video.title: Bouncing and Trouncing

Video.summary: A woman says her son-in-law stole money out of her deceased daughter's bank account; a plaintiff contends that as soon as he broke things off with the defendant, she stole his identity.
Video.title: Grave Robbing

Video.summary: A couple say their ex-landlord rented them a property under false pretenses and misled them about amenities and utility costs, so they should not have to pay any fees; a man contends that his former friend forgave a $300 loan when he lost his job.
Video.title: Everything Is Not Included
